payload.label: mirror
payload.long_description: Oval, mostly frameless wall mirror mounted vertically that reflects a framed painting and a towel ring; mirror is edge-cropped/partial in the image, appears medium-sized (roughly 0.6–0.8 m tall) and is approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"mirror","short_description":"oval frameless wall mirror crop","long_description":"Oval, mostly frameless wall mirror mounted vertically that reflects a framed painting and a towel ring; mirror is edge-cropped/partial in the image, appears medium-sized (roughly 0.6–0.8 m tall) and is approximately 0.8 m from the camera.","attributes":["oval shape","frameless / thin silver edge","wall-mounted","reflective surface","painting visible in reflection","towel ring visible in reflection","partial / edge-cropped","medium size (~0.6–0.8 m)","vertical orientation","compression/artifacted appearance"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
